overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game (Final Fantasy VII Remake) showing a character in a white coat exploring an indoor hydroponic facility with green-tinted artificial lighting. The character walks past rows of illuminated growing beds and approaches a circular airlock door where another character briefly appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: hydroponic cultivation chamber with glass enclosures

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the hydroponic facility, observing the green-lit growing beds on the right

notable_agents.action: standing stationary behind the glass enclosure on the upper level

entered.detail: rows of illuminated green hydroponic plant beds with metal frames and grow lights
large metal ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
transparent glass wall separating the walkway from the upper growing platform
large circular metal door with window showing exterior corridor
brown cardboard box sitting on the floor near the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial corridor lined with green-lit hydroponic growing beds on the right side. Overhead pipes run along the ceiling, and a circular airlock door is visible in the distance. A solitary figure stands behind the glass enclosure in the background, observing the facility.

events.description: an NPC enters through the circular airlock door from the left corridor

agents.ego_description: approaching the circular airlock door while another character walks past from the doorway

notable_agents.action: walking through the circular doorway toward the camera, then passing by on the left

segments.scene_description: As the character approaches the circular airlock door, an NPC enters from the left corridor and walks past toward the hydroponic area. The glass enclosure recedes behind as the character nears the exit, with the circular door now dominating the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a green-lit industrial corridor that culminates at a large circular airlock. It begins by trailing a character walking past rows of illuminated hydroponic growing beds and overhead pipes, with a solitary figure visible behind a distant glass enclosure. As the character advances, the perspective shifts to bring the circular door into focus while an NPC enters from a side corridor and crosses the path toward the growing area. The scene then narrows its focus as the glass enclosure recedes into the background, finally leaving the massive airlock door to dominate the center of the frame.
